query:
SELECT
      rank,
      preview_image_url AS image,
      display_name,
      inviter,
      is_blacklisted,
      invite_count,
      toDate(first_invite_ts) AS first_invite,
      toDate(last_invite_ts)  AS last_invite
    FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_inviters_ranking
    ORDER BY rank
    LIMIT 100
